creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Multiple [1][2][3] users have reported/mentioned this issue (and on IRC). Affects some/many people seems appropriate.

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2016-August/273262.html
[2] http://www.bsdforen.de/threads/fehler-bei-update-von-javavmwrapper-2-5.32867/
[2] http://www.pastebin.ca/3707946

CC last committer (bapt) in case they can assist.
